_reason: No program at Universite de Sherbrooke's Faculte de medecine et des sciences de la sante maps honestly to this platform's India/NEET-audience course catalog (mbbs, medical-pg, bsc-nursing, pharmacy, bds). Instruction is French-only (CASPer situational-judgment test must also be taken in French), the M.D. (Doctorat en medecine) is a DEC (Quebec CEGEP)-prerequisite or 90-credit entry program with roughly 80% of seats reserved for Quebec residents and ~12% for Maritime-province residents by government-set quota, and the international-applicant pool is effectively a single seat per year worldwide (about 5.5% acceptance rate among international applicants, with just 1 of 15-91 international applicants enrolling in recent cycles). See the .md file in this folder for the full research record and sourcing.
